techniques.name: Network Service Discovery
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of services running on remote hosts.

techniques.name: LLMNR/NBT-NS Poisoning and SMB Relay
techniques.description: Adversaries may spoof name resolution responses or relay SMB authentication.

techniques.name: Kerberoasting
techniques.description: Adversaries may request Kerberos service tickets and crack them offline.

techniques.name: AS-REP Roasting
techniques.description: Adversaries may obtain AS-REP data for users without Kerberos preauthentication.

techniques.name: Pass the Hash
techniques.description: Adversaries may authenticate with captured password hashes.

techniques.name: Password Spraying
techniques.description: Adversaries may use one password against many accounts.

techniques.name: Remote Desktop Protocol
techniques.description: Adversaries may use RDP to log into remote systems.

techniques.name: SMB/Windows Admin Shares
techniques.description: Adversaries may use SMB and admin shares for remote access.

techniques.name: Windows Remote Management
techniques.description: Adversaries may use WinRM for remote execution.

techniques.name: LSASS Memory
techniques.description: Adversaries may dump LSASS memory for credentials.

techniques.name: Security Account Manager
techniques.description: Adversaries may dump SAM hashes from Windows hosts.

techniques.name: DCSync
techniques.description: Adversaries may use DCSync to replicate directory secrets.

techniques.name: Golden Ticket
techniques.description: Adversaries may forge Kerberos ticket-granting tickets.

techniques.name: File and Directory Discovery
techniques.description: Adversaries may enumerate files and directories.

techniques.name: SNMP MIB Dump
techniques.description: Adversaries may dump SNMP MIB data.

techniques.name: Exploitation of Remote Services
techniques.description: Adversaries may exploit remote services for access.

techniques.name: Print Processors
techniques.description: Adversaries may abuse print processors for persistence.

techniques.name: Domain Groups
techniques.description: Adversaries may enumerate domain groups.

techniques.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
techniques.description: Adversaries may exploit internet-facing applications.

techniques.name: Data from Local System
techniques.description: Adversaries may collect data from local systems.

techniques.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
techniques.description: Adversaries may execute commands and scripts.
